content: Hey, I'm so excited for my upcoming trip to Japan. I've always wanted to visit Tokyo and try all the amazing food.
That sounds like an amazing adventure! What specifically are you looking forward to trying in Tokyo?
Definitely the sushi and ramen. I've heard great things about the food scene there. By the way, I'm Zion, nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too, Zion! Sushi and ramen are definitely must-tries in Tokyo. Have you thought about visiting any other cities in Japan during your trip?
Yeah, I'm thinking about visiting Osaka and Kyoto too. I've heard they're really beautiful cities. I'm actually working remotely from Phoenix, AZ right now, so it'll be a nice change of scenery.
That sounds like a great plan! Osaka and Kyoto are definitely worth visiting. How do you like working remotely from Phoenix? Is it a big change from where you used to live?
It's been an adjustment, but I like it. I used to live in the Bay Area, but the cost of living was getting too high. I'm a UX researcher, so I can work from anywhere, which is nice.
That makes sense. The Bay Area can be expensive. So, what do you like to do in your free time, Zion?
I'm really into DJing and tennis. I try to play tennis at least a few times a week. And I've recently gotten into archery, which is a lot of fun.
That's cool! I've never tried archery before, but it sounds like a great way to relax. Do you have a favorite tennis court in Phoenix that you like to play at?
Yeah, there's a great court near my apartment that I like to play at. It's got a really nice view of the city. And after I play, I like to grab a coffee at this cafe that does a great pour-over.
Coffee is always a great way to refuel after a workout. Pour-over is a great way to make coffee, I've heard. Do you have a favorite coffee bean that you like to use?
Actually, I've been getting into coffee brewing myself. I just got a new coffee grinder and I'm experimenting with different roasts.
That's awesome! Coffee brewing can be a fun hobby. What made you want to start brewing your own coffee?
I just like the process of it, I guess. It's like a little ritual that I enjoy. And I've been trying to get into origami too, which is similar in a way.
Origami is a great hobby! It can be very relaxing. Have you made anything interesting with origami recently?
Yeah, I just made a little crane that turned out pretty well. It's not perfect, but it was fun to make. I'm thinking about making some origami animals to decorate my apartment with.
That sounds like a great idea! Origami animals can be really cute. I'm sure your apartment will look great with them. Do you have any fun plans for the rest of the week?
